overall.description: Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing exploration of a luxury penthouse rooftop in Night City. The camera exits a modern glass interior, ascends exterior stairs past a character in a Samurai jacket, and traverses the wooden deck lounge area with palm trees and futuristic city skyline views.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern luxury interior with glass ceiling overlooking terrace

events.description: exiting interior space through glass doors onto outdoor wooden terrace
transition from diffused interior light to bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through modern interior space toward the exterior terrace exit

entered.detail: transparent glass roof structure with metal framework spanning the interior
dark polished marble or stone flooring reflecting interior lights
tall tropical palm trees visible through the glass walls
futuristic skyscrapers and towers of Night City visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a modern luxury penthouse with a glass ceiling canopy overhead. The camera walks forward across polished dark flooring toward glass doors, exiting around the 7-second mark onto a sunlit wooden terrace with views of palm trees and the distant Night City skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior terrace with floating wooden stairs and glass railings

events.description: beginning ascent of exterior wooden stairs with transparent glass railings
reaching the top of the stairs where a character stands on the rooftop deck

agents.ego_description: climbing the exterior stairs toward the character standing at the rooftop level

notable_agents.action: standing at the top of the stairs drinking from a cup, wearing a black Samurai jacket

entered.detail: modern staircase with transparent glass side panels and wooden steps
wide wooden steps with warm brown tones leading upward
clear glass safety railing along the staircase edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves across the exterior terrace and begins ascending a modern floating staircase with glass railings and wooden treads. A character wearing a distinctive Samurai jacket stands at the top of the stairs drinking, becoming the focal point as the camera approaches the rooftop level.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury rooftop deck with lounge seating and panoramic city views

camera moves past the character to explore the rooftop ahead

agents.ego_description: following then overtaking the character as he walks across the rooftop terrace, eventually moving ahead to explore the lounge area

notable_agents.action: walking slowly across the wooden deck while drinking from a cup, looking at the view

entered.detail: modern white lounge sofa with clean lines positioned on the deck
expansive wooden decking covering the rooftop surface

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the rooftop, the camera follows the character as he walks across the wooden deck drinking and enjoying the view. The camera then overtakes him, revealing white outdoor lounge furniture and panoramic views of the Night City skyline with palm trees swaying in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop lounge area with pergola seating and fire pits overlooking the city

agents.ego_description: walking through the rooftop lounge area examining the outdoor furniture, pergola structure, and detailed city views

entered.detail: bright blue reclining lounge chairs arranged on red rugs
rectangular red rugs placed under the lounge furniture
large open-air pergola with slatted roof covering a seating area with red sofas
low square tables with fire pit centers positioned between seating
raised planters with greenery and grass patches integrated into the deck

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the expansive rooftop lounge, moving past white sofas and bright blue lounge chairs arranged on red rugs. The view opens up to reveal a modern pergola structure with red outdoor sofas underneath, fire pit tables, and detailed views of the Night City skyline with flying vehicles visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered interior of a luxury penthouse out onto an expansive, sun-drenched rooftop overlooking Night City. It begins inside a modern space under a glass ceiling canopy, moving across polished dark flooring toward glass doors that open onto a wooden terrace. As the camera exits into the sunlight, it ascends a floating staircase with glass railings, drawing closer to a character in a Samurai jacket standing at the top. The scene then shifts to the rooftop level, following the character across the wooden deck before overtaking him to reveal white outdoor lounge furniture. Finally, the view expands into a panoramic vista of the futuristic city skyline with palm trees swaying in the background.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a luxury rooftop lounge that gradually expands to reveal the sprawling urban horizon of Night City. It begins by gliding past an arrangement of white sofas and bright blue lounge chairs set upon vibrant red rugs. As the camera advances, the space opens up toward a modern pergola structure sheltering red outdoor sofas and glowing fire pit tables. The scene then shifts its focus outward, transitioning from the intimate lounge setting to a panoramic vista of the futuristic skyline. Finally, the view settles on the distant city architecture where flying vehicles drift through the air.
